title: Classic American Suet Pudding
description: A traditional British recipe made with suet and flour. Perfect for a hearty snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, rub the suet into the flour until it resembles breadcrumbs.
Add the sugar and mix until well combined.
Gradually add the milk and mix until a smooth batter is formed.
Add the vanilla extract and mix well.
Transfer the batter to a greased 1L pudding basin.
Cover the pudding with a piece of parchment paper and tie with string.
Place the pudding in a large saucepan and add enough hot water to come halfway up the side of the basin.
Bring the water to a boil, then cover the saucepan with a lid and simmer for 2 hours.
Remove the pudding from the water and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the pudding warm, garnished with your choice of toppings.
